purpose: Minimum QA-driven follow-up from W69 local Canny matrix: keep the preferred softer-edge request, then improve mildly dim eye sockets and remaining skin polish without increasing harsh edge transfer.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture with fine pores, subtle human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clear iris detail, visible soft catchlights in both eyes, gentle frontal eye fill, open shadow detail around the eyelids, natural under-eye texture, detailed natural hair, edge-guided but natural composition, coherent face silhouette, clean but not over-sharpened jawline, separated neck and shirt collar, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, calm neutral interior background, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, gritty oversharpened skin, over-sharpened edges, dark edge halos, harsh outlines, black contour stains, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, colored blotches, paint marks, dim eye sockets, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, smeared jawline, warped collar edge, control map stains, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso
